interface.shortDescription: Pinned 1C developer tools and MCP servers for Codex
interface.longDescription: Unica packages pinned macOS arm64 tools for 1C:Enterprise development: bsl-analyzer, v8-runner, rlm-tools-bsl, and the public v8std MCP endpoint. Tool binaries are launched through checksum-verifying wrappers so a plugin version maps to a known toolset.
defaultPrompt: Set up 1C development tools for this repo
Explore this large 1C codebase with rlm-tools-bsl
Run v8-runner checks for this 1C project
